segments.text: The fastest way to get 4,000 watch
hours on YouTube is not what most
creators think. Shorts watch time
doesn't count, so stop chasing shorts
if monetization is the goal.
What you actually want to make is long-form
videos that people actually finish.
But here's the thing, don't just make
them long for the sake of it. Because
what matters is that people
actually stay and keep watching. A
20-minute video people finish beats a
45minute video people click off of after
2 minutes every single time. So
make content people want to finish and
then inside that video add end
screen cards and playlists that push
viewers into your next video. And if you
really want to push it further, start
going live. Live streams count towards
your 4,000 hours in real time. And a
single 2-hour live stream with
even a small audience can do what takes
a dozen regular videos to achieve.
